message:
fix(refinery): clamp negative MR priority to lowest instead of highest (gt-jg62)

Negative priorities (e.g. -1 sentinel) were clamped to priorityBonus=4
(P0/highest), silently giving maximum priority to MRs with invalid
priority values. Now clamps to priorityBonus=0 (P4/lowest) and logs
a warning. Added tests for priority clamping edge cases.
